attributes.action: Working day to finish when Pitbull fire ball is played during a working day
attributes.additional_details: Because once “Fireball” is played, workplace focus is effectively over and morale has clearly moved into end-of-day territory. A rule like this would boost happiness, improve workplace culture, and finally recognise the national importance of knowing when the day is truly done.
attributes.background: When Pitbull’s “Fireball” is played during the working day, employees should be allowed to stop work immediately on full pay. The Government should introduce a rule requiring employers to treat the song as the official end of the workday.
